title: cyanea recta
intro: Cyanea recta, also known as the Hawaiian lobeliad, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Hawaii, belonging to the family Campanulaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyanea recta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antiviral and antibacterial activities, making it a valuable natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Cyanea recta include infusion and decoction, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds for topical and internal use.
